motifs.name: ocean_mark
motifs.description: Mark of the ocean, central to identity

motifs.name: star_night_sea
motifs.description: Star used for night sea navigation

motifs.name: dugong
motifs.description: Dugong (sea cow) pattern, a sacred marine mammal in Urak Lawoi belief and the origin of island names

motifs.name: fishing_net
motifs.description: Crosshatch pattern mimicking the traditional hand-woven fishing nets used by Urak Lawoi fishers

motifs.name: sea_turtle
motifs.description: Sea turtle shell pattern reflecting the Urak Lawoi's deep connection to marine turtles

motifs.name: boat_prow
motifs.description: Curved prow of the traditional Urak Lawoi long-tail boat used for inter-island travel

motifs.name: sea_cucumber
motifs.description: Elongated pattern representing the sea cucumber harvested and traded by Urak Lawoi divers
